_comment: Claude Code 환경 템플릿. 새 PC/계정에서 setup.sh 실행 후 이 파일을 settings.json에 병합하거나 기반으로 사용.

permissions._comment_projects: 작업 프로젝트마다 아래 3줄 패턴으로 추가. 예: Read(/Users/{username}/{project}/**)

hooks.command:
bash -c '
input=$(cat)
cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null)
exit_code=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_response\",{}).get(\"exit_code\",0))" 2>/dev/null)
stdout=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_response\",{}).get(\"stdout\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null)
stderr=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_response\",{}).get(\"stderr\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null)

if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "tsc|typecheck|type-check|npm run build|pnpm run build|yarn build|npm run test|pnpm test|jest|vitest"; then
  result_file="/private/tmp/claude-build-result.txt"
  output="$stdout$stderr"
  line_count=$(echo "$output" | wc -l | tr -d " ")
  if [ "$exit_code" -ne 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    status="FAIL"
  else
    status="PASS"
  fi
  echo "CMD=$cmd" > "$result_file"
  echo "STATUS=$status" >> "$result_file"
  echo "LINES=$line_count" >> "$result_file"
  echo "EXIT=$exit_code" >> "$result_file"
  if [ "$line_count" -gt 100 ] && [ "$status" = "FAIL" ]; then
    echo "SUMMARY=LOG_TRUNCATED" >> "$result_file"
    echo "$output" | tail -20 >> "$result_file"
  else
    echo "$output" >> "$result_file"
  fi
fi
exit 0
'

bash -c '
result_file="/private/tmp/claude-build-result.txt"
if [ -f "$result_file" ]; then
  status=$(grep "^STATUS=" "$result_file" | cut -d= -f2)
  cmd=$(grep "^CMD=" "$result_file" | cut -d= -f2- | head -c 80)
  lines=$(grep "^LINES=" "$result_file" | cut -d= -f2)
  exit_code=$(grep "^EXIT=" "$result_file" | cut -d= -f2)
  summary=$(grep "^SUMMARY=" "$result_file" | cut -d= -f2)

  echo ""
  echo "━━━ 빌드/테스트 결과 ━━━"
  if [ "$status" = "PASS" ]; then
    echo "✅ 통과: $cmd"
  else
    echo "❌ 실패: $cmd"
    echo "⚠️  완료 선언 전 위 오류를 확인하세요."
    if [ "$summary" = "LOG_TRUNCATED" ]; then
      echo "[로그 축약 — 전체 ${lines}줄 중 마지막 20줄만 표시]"
    fi
  fi
  echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

  rm -f "$result_file"
fi
exit 0
'
